ddls:
CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the statement */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the logical statement */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the statement is correct */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was last updated */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of the statement (e.g., true/false, yes/no, multiple-choice) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statement (e.g., book, article, expert) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the statement (e.g., logic, fallacy, critical thinking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "icon_path" TEXT /* Path to the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explanations" (
  "explanation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explanation */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement the explanation belongs to */,
  "explanation_text" TEXT /* Text of the explanation */,
  "correct_information" TEXT /* Correct information to clarify the statement */,
  "additional_context" TEXT /* Additional context or details */,
  "references" TEXT /* Additional references or sources for the explanation */,
  "multimedia_links" TEXT /* Links to multimedia resources (e.g., videos, images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explanation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanations_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "avatar_path" TEXT /* Path to the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., practice, quiz, study) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement the response is for */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's response */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response is correct */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was given */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the response was given */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* User's confidence level in their response (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "explanation_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user read the explanation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., content, technical, suggestion) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts by the user in the category */,
  "correct_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of correct attempts by the user in the category */,
  "last_practiced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last practice session */,
  "last_assessment" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last assessment */,
  "current_level" TEXT /* Current level of the user in the category */,
  "next_level_target" TEXT /* Target for the next level in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., practice, quiz) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment ended */,
  "total_questions" INTEGER /* Total number of questions in the assessment */,
  "correct_answers" INTEGER /* Number of correct answers by the user */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the assessment */,
  "assessment_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the assessment (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "assessment_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question in an assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement used in the question */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the question in the assessment */,
  "question_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES user_assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assessment_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response in an assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question in the assessment */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's response */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response is correct */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was given */,
  "response_time_taken" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessment_responses_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES user_assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessment_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES assessment_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assessment_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., article, video, quiz) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was accessed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the resource access */,
  "resource_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the resource (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "resource_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_resources_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone for the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* Notification preference (e.g., email, SMS, push notifications) */,
  "font_size" TEXT /* Preferred font size */,
  "text_color" TEXT /* Preferred text color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "goal_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "goal_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the goal (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "goal_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate expires */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the certificate */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of the certificate (e.g., completion, achievement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_certificates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was issued */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the badge image */,
  "badge_type" TEXT /* Type of the badge (e.g., completion, achievement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "date_reached" TEXT /* Date the achievement was reached */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of the achievement (e.g., completion, milestone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the award certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_awards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
